description: A key milestone in a project was delayed by 2 weeks. An agent must update the project plan to reflect this.

nodes.task_description: Load the current project plan (Gantt chart).
Identify the delayed milestone and all subsequent tasks that depend on it.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies all dependent tasks.

nodes.task_description: Shift the start dates of all dependent tasks by 2 weeks.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly updates the project plan.

nodes.task_description: Recalculate the new project end date and report the total delay.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the new end date and states the overall project is now delayed by 2 weeks.
